name: AMREP CORP.
summary: AMREP Corporation, organized in 1961 as an Oklahoma corporation, operates through two business segments: land development and homebuilding, primarily in Rio Rancho and Sandoval County, New Mexico. The company sells developed and undeveloped residential lots and commercial/industrial sites, provides landscaping services, and builds single-family detached and attached homes. As of April 30, 2025, it owned approximately 16,600 acres in Sandoval County and employed 49 people.
